ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., router, switch, firewall) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "device_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the traffic */,
  "bytes_in" TEXT /* Number of bytes received by the device */,
  "bytes_out" TEXT /* Number of bytes sent by the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the traffic (e.g., OK, ERROR) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the traffic record */,
  "traffic_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the traffic (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "traffic_source_port" INTEGER /* Source port number of the traffic */,
  "traffic_destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port number of the traffic */,
  "traffic_packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage for the traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_captures" (
  "capture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet capture */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that captured the packet */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the packet */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the packet */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the packet (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "payload" TEXT /* Payload of the packet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the packet capture */,
  "capture_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the packet capture (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "capture_source_port" INTEGER /* Source port number of the packet capture */,
  "capture_destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port number of the packet capture */,
  "capture_payload_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet capture payload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_captures_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the flow record */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the flow */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the flow */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the flow (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "bytes" TEXT /* Number of bytes in the flow */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the flow record */,
  "record_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the flow record (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP) */,
  "record_source_port" INTEGER /* Source port number of the flow record */,
  "record_destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port number of the flow record */,
  "record_packet_count" INTEGER /* Number of packets in the flow record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log record */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the system log (e.g., system, security, application) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the system log (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that generated the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., high CPU, high memory) */,
  "alarm_message" TEXT /* Alarm message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "alarm_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "alarm_category" TEXT /* Category of the alarm (e.g., system, security, network) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., traffic, alarm) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Dashboard data */,
  "dashboard_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart, table) */,
  "dashboard_widgets" TEXT /* Widgets on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
